notes: B19 + HTTP 400 error strategy. Based on #278 capture: Mistral uses superjson NDJSON (impossible to fake). New approach: return HTTP 400 Bad Request with tRPC error JSON. tRPC httpBatchLink treats non-200 as TRPCClientError and may display error.message to user via toast/alert. This is fundamentally different from previous 200-status attempts. 특히 에러 토스트, 경고 팝업, 또는 에러 메시지가 화면에 표시되는지 확인. 프롬프트 입력은 clipboard paste 사용.
